oracle_goal: Determine whether the accepted Track A lineage still reproduces the IF09 finding conditions or demonstrates their absence without regression on the authorized surface.
pass_condition: The authorized revalidation surface no longer reproduces the IF09 failure condition and no regression is introduced on the tracked lineage.
fail_condition: The IF09 failure condition is still reproducible or a new regression is introduced on the tracked lineage.
forbidden_inference: No closure, remediation_proven, or safety claim can be made outside the explicit revalidation execution and downstream adjudication/closure gates.
